comment: Quiet room right in town, an easy walk to the battlefield. Restful night's sleep.
Good base for a museum day on the Mall. A little street noise but comfortable.
Peaceful cottage on the bay. Watched the herons from the porch each morning.
Gracious host and a very quiet room close to Seminary Ridge. Would stay again.
Lovely waterfront spot in Easton. Simple, clean, and calm after a long drive.
Convenient for a day of walking Georgetown. Host left clear check-in notes.
Quiet harbor inn near Chestertown. Perfect for a restful overnight on the Eastern Shore.
